items.title: BSc Computer Security & Digital Forensics
items.subtitle: Jaramogi Oginga Odinga University of Science and Technology
items.description: Core focus on digital forensics, network defense, privacy, and secure systems design. Member of JOOUST ISACA, Enactus, and Cyber Chief Circle, contributing technical writing and awareness campaigns.

items.title: Campus Ambassador
items.subtitle: CTFZone Labs
items.description: Lead campus mentorship sessions, host guided TryHackMe/CTFZone labs, and promote local awareness of hands-on cybersecurity skills.

items.title: Congressman, School of Informatics & Innovative Systems
items.subtitle: JOOUST Students’ Association
items.description: Represent student interests in policy and budget forums, support accountability initiatives, and connect peers with academic resources.

items.title: IT Support Intern
items.subtitle: Systems Hub Ltd
items.description: Assisted with network rollouts, workstation imaging, and user access recovery. Streamlined ticket handling with Microsoft Office automation.

items.title: Technical Writer
items.subtitle: JOOUST ISACA Student Group
items.description: Publish technical pieces on zero-trust, SOC playbooks, and secure software practices for chapter members and student audiences.

items.title: Cybersecurity Event Contributor
items.subtitle: Cyber Chief Circle, Chain Erasmus, Enactus JOOUST
items.description: Presented at hackathons, digital-summit sessions, and awareness campaigns covering AI/DevSecOps, SIEM operations, and digital inclusion.
